name: Domino's Pizza Group PLC
description: The master franchisee for Domino's Pizza in the UK, Ireland, and select European markets. Asset-light franchise model with high cash generation.

assumptions.revenueDrivers: System sales growth from new store openings (1,300+ UK stores target), menu innovation, digital ordering penetration (90%+), and like-for-like order growth.
assumptions.marginDrivers: Franchise model means high incremental margins on system sales growth. Royalty and rental income streams. Operating leverage as stores mature.
assumptions.risks: Franchisee profitability pressure from cost inflation, consumer spending weakness, competitive delivery market (Just Eat, Uber Eats), significant leverage from buybacks.
assumptions.catalyst: Store rollout toward 1,600 target, delivery market growth, collection channel strength, and continued capital returns via buybacks.
